evidence: "I love westerns and enjoy Jeff Bridges immensely."
"Simply a fun flick to watch!! Characters are great!"
"I love both Jim Belushi and Louis Gossett Jr. and they didn't disappoint."
"Not a comedy, though the funny is still there."
"I love De Niro! He can put class into anything!"
"Denzel Washington's awesome ability to to make his characters so believable is a joy!"
"the theme of this Western is not new, but delightful in the retelling!"
"This story touches the heart...I will watch it again."
"It was great!! A couple of cheesy parts made it a four star only...but whoa what a four star!!!"

summary: The user has a strong preference for comedies and westerns, enjoying fast-paced, simple narratives that provide a good time. They appreciate humor and feel-good experiences, but show less concern for production quality and brand loyalty.
